name: Ice Cream Filled Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop the ice cream into six individual balls and freeze until very firm (at least 5 hours).
2. Cut each orange in half crosswise.
3. Remove any thin slice from the bottom of each half.
4. Carefully cut around the edges and membranes, then remove the fruit and membranes from the shells.
5. Line the bottom of each shell with fruit.
6. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
7. Preheat the oven to 500 degrees F (260 degrees C).
8. Beat the egg whites and cream of tartar in a bowl until foamy.
9. Gradually beat in sugar, one tablespoon at a time, continuing to beat until stiff and glossy meringue forms.
10. Place the orange shells on an ungreased baking sheet.
11. Fill each shell with an ice cream ball, completely covering the ice cream with the meringue, sealing it to the edge of the shell.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 2 to 3 minutes, or until the meringue is light brown.
13. Serve immediately.
